user.title: Multi-Zone Mini-Split Thermostat
user.description: Set up a virtual thermostat that manages multiple mini-split climate entities.

preset_config.title: Configure Preset Temperatures
preset_config.description: Set heating and cooling target temperatures for each preset. These temperatures are shared across all climate entities in the group.

add_entity.title: Add Climate Entity
add_entity.description: Add a climate entity to this thermostat group.

add_entity_confirm.title: Add Another Entity?
add_entity_confirm.description: Would you like to add another climate entity to this group?

set_entity_preset.name: Set Entity Preset
set_entity_preset.description: Set the preset for a specific underlying climate entity.

entity.name: Entity
entity.description: The underlying climate entity ID to set the preset for.

preset.name: Preset
preset.description: The preset to apply (comfort, eco, or failsafe).
